items.title: Matteo Moretto: Barcelona is already negotiating Alessandro Bastoni's contract details
items.snippet: Moretto exclusive: contract talks advancing with Bastoni for summer 2026 move. Barça willing to meet Inter's €70M valuation.

items.title: Matteo Moretto reveals the center-back that FC Barcelona want to sign: good, pretty, and cheap
items.snippet: Moretto: Barcelona looking at Murillo from Nottingham Forest as a budget option for the centre-back position. Could be a bargain at €40M.

items.title: Fabrizio Romano announces the first 2026 signing that Barça are already negotiating
items.snippet: Barcelona has initiated negotiations for Alessandro Bastoni from Inter Milan. Romano confirms there are advanced contacts in the last 48 hours for the Italian center-back.

items.title: Fabrizio Romano confirms Barcelona has made an enquiry for Julián Álvarez
items.snippet: Romano: Barcelona has made an official enquiry for Julián Alvarez of Atlético Madrid. The forward could cost over €100M.

items.title: Toni Juanmartí: Joaquim Piera explica que Artur Cabral es el elegido para reforzar la delantera
items.snippet: Juanmartí relata via Joaquim Piera que el club catalán evalúa opciones de delantera. Rashford continúa siendo prioridad para el extremo izquierdo.

items.title: Man City star 'finalises agreement' to join Barcelona after Romano reveals third player to leave
items.snippet: Bernardo Silva agreed personal terms with Barcelona for free transfer. Manchester City contract expires summer 2026.

items.title: Matteo Moretto: Marcos Senesi closely followed by Barcelona
items.snippet: Marcos Senesi from Bournemouth and Branimir Mlacic on Barça's radar to replace Christensen. Decision in January.
